summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 13 major bug fixes and improvements in Retail Book app. All backend APIs (42/42) working perfectly including new POST /api/jobwork/move-emb endpoint. Frontend features 95% functional with all major UI changes implemented correctly: New Bill discount placeholder, Payment Date positioning, PDF download button, Job Work sort buttons, Manage Orders renamed and grouped by reference, Daybook collapsible sections with prominent date filter, and PDF invoice generation with GST breakdown.

design_issues.issue: Page shows empty when no customer filter is applied - may need default data display
design_issues.note: Functionality works correctly when filters are applied, may be intentional design

passed_tests: All 42 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
POST /api/jobwork/move-emb endpoint accepts item_ids, new_status, emb_labour_amount, emb_customer_amount
PDF Invoice GET /api/invoice?ref=03/010426 generates PDF with 'NARWANA AGENCIES' header
PDF Invoice contains GST 5% breakdown in fabric section
PDF Invoice has Tailoring section when tailoring items exist
PDF Invoice has Terms & Conditions at bottom
Settlement balances correctly return fabric/tailoring pending for ref 04/010426 (fabric: ₹3370)
New Bill: Discount input shows 'Discount %' placeholder instead of being pre-filled with 0
New Bill: Payment Date field is positioned below Amount Received
New Bill: After saving, Download PDF button appears in success message
New Bill: Barcode scanner button exists next to barcode input
Job Work: Sort buttons (Ord, Date, Del) visible in each kanban column (12 found)
Job Work: Embroidery tab - Required column has a move button
Manage Orders: Page title is 'Manage Orders', sidebar shows 'Manage Orders'
Manage Orders: Items are grouped by reference with collapsible rows
Manage Orders: PDF invoice links work correctly with proper URL format
Daybook: Date filter is prominent (below title, not in corner)
Daybook: Pending and Reconciled sections are collapsible (Pending section visible with dropdown)
Daybook: Table headers are clickable for sorting (8 sortable headers found)
Navigation: All 12 sidebar items render correctly including Manage Orders
Barcode scanner button opens modal (expected camera access limitations in headless environment)
All existing functionality continues to work (Dashboard, Search, Reports, Data Manager)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (42/42 tests passed including new jobwork/move-emb endpoint)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor UI display issue in Manage Orders when no filters applied)
